title: adapter/eventlog (sharded JSONL append + read)
acceptance_criteria: Append uses O_APPEND with line-atomic writes (one event per line, ≤4KiB).
Read iterates shards in date order, applies filter, sorts within shard by ts.
EventFilter.IDPrefix matches both the exact id and descendants (RKN-E01 matches RKN-E01-S03).
